title: Cosmic Pixelmon
description:
pixelmon modpack for the cosmic pixelmon server. 
Server IP: jogar.cosmicpixelmon.com.br
body:
# 🌟 Welcome to Cosmic Pixelmon! 🌟

After **_months of preparation_**, we’re excited to announce the **official launch** of _Cosmic Pixelmon_! 🎉  
Our server is finally live and ready to welcome trainers from all across **Brazil and beyond**!

Cosmic Pixelmon combines the best of the **Pixelmon world** with a unique and competitive twist. Designed with care, our server offers a _fun_, _balanced progression system_ for **all types of players** — whether you're here to collect, battle, build, or compete.

🟢 **Server is online now!**  
Connect via IP: **jogar.cosmicpixelmon.com.br**

---

## 💡 Main Features

### 🔹 STS (Sell to Server)  
Predefined Pokémon sell prices for easy money-making.

### 🔹 Hunt System  
Track and catch specific Pokémon to **earn exclusive rewards**.

### 🔹 GTS (Global Trade System)  
Trade Pokémon safely and easily with other players.

### 🔹 PokéBuilder  
Upgrade your Pokémon’s stats using earned tokens.

### 🔹 Battle Pass  
Complete themed missions and unlock seasonal rewards.

### 🔹 Playtime Rewards  
Receive bonuses just for staying online!

### 🔹 Weekly Tournaments  
Compete for **glory and amazing prizes** every week.

### 🔹 Player Customization  
Unlock _exclusive_ wearable items and cosmetics.

### 🔹 Boosters  
Speed up gameplay with special boosts.

### 🔹 Lucky Blocks  
Open them for **random surprises** and rare items!

### 🔹 VIP Ranks  
Choose from multiple VIPs with powerful perks and advantages.

### 🔹 Crates  
Unlock special gear, items, and Pokémon.

---

## 🌌 Why Cosmic Pixelmon?

If you're looking for a **dynamic** and **friendly** Pixelmon community with **custom content**, **frequent events**, and a _unique progression system_, then:

# **Cosmic Pixelmon is the place for you!** 🚀
